name: putty-bridge
description: Generate a Windows PuTTY .reg + tmux snippet for remote tmux + Claude Code: UTF-8, true color, deuteranopia-friendly dark palette, native copy/paste (right-click pastes, Shift-drag in tmux mouse-mode auto-copies via PuTTY's local selection), 50k scrollback, secure defaults. No PuTTY GUI clicks.
